title: Sci-fi like UI for Beta 1.7.3
description: This texture pack changes every in-game UI to something more futuristic.
body:
The texture pack changes every In-game UI to something more futuristic. There's also some other minor additions in the texture pack, Such as the breaking animation being a loading bar, And the texture pack also changing the Jukebox and Noteblock's appearance.

Originally only made as a test to figure out how texture packs in Beta work, But then turned into a full on texture pack. No plans on putting it into modern minecraft, But if it recieves enough attention i might consider doing so :D

## Note: The texture pack works perfectly without Optifine.

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409be8213c7028ba9440742eb0034c68cc736729.png)
